# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in HenKaiPan, please report it by emailing **henkaipan@dyallab.com.ar**.

Please do **not** create a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

### What to include

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fixes (if known)

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and work on a fix. Once the fix is released, we may publicly disclose the vulnerability after users have had reasonable time to update.
